description: Component for importing Snowflake workspace entities as Dagster assets.

warehouse.label: Warehouse
warehouse.description: Snowflake warehouse to use for queries

import_tasks.label: Import Tasks
import_tasks.description: Import Snowflake tasks as materializable assets

import_stored_procedures.label: Import Stored Procedures
import_stored_procedures.description: Import stored procedures as materializable assets

import_dynamic_tables.label: Import Dynamic Tables
import_dynamic_tables.description: Import dynamic tables as observable assets

import_snowpipes.label: Import Snowpipes
import_snowpipes.description: Import Snowpipe continuous ingestion pipes as materializable assets

import_stages.label: Import Stages
import_stages.description: Import internal and external stages as observable assets

filter_by_name_pattern.label: Filter By Name Pattern
filter_by_name_pattern.description: Regex pattern to filter entities by name

exclude_name_pattern.label: Exclude Name Pattern
exclude_name_pattern.description: Regex pattern to exclude entities by name

generate_sensor.label: Generate Sensor
generate_sensor.description: Create a sensor to observe task runs and dynamic table refreshes

group_name.label: Group Name
group_name.description: Group name for all imported assets

description.label: Description
description.description: Description for the Snowflake workspace component

assets_by_name.label: Assets by Name
assets_by_name.description: Override the AssetSpec for specific imported entities (Tasks, Dynamic Tables, Stored Procedures, Streams, Snowpipes, Stages, Materialized Views, External Tables, Alerts, OpenFlow Flows) by their Snowflake name. Mirrors the official dagster-databricks DatabricksWorkspaceComponent.assets_by_task_key shape. Per-entity dict supports: key (slash-separated AssetKey), group_name, description, deps (list of upstream asset keys, merged with auto-inferred), metadata (dict-merged), tags (dict-merged), kinds (set), owners (list).

name: Snowflake Workspace
